consequence: Gap_w(z)>=0 for all z>=0; equality occurs at z=1, with the full-support case identically zero.
name: Exact two-level high-support gap factor certificate
normalization: Gap_w(z)=A_w(1)(k z^2+r)^(w/2)-24^(w/2) sum_j N_j z^j, where k=24-r and N_j counts shell blocks meeting the k-support in j points.
scope: High-support two-level/threshold directions only: w=12 complement r=0..5; w=16 complement r=0..2. This does not prove arbitrary multilevel directions.
statement: For shell weights w=12,16 and the high-support complement sizes left by the AM-GM sieve, the two-level shell gap polynomial factors as (z-1)^2 Q(z) with Q having nonnegative integer coefficients.
